label: Similarity Golden Regression Gate
scopeDescription: Golden gate for sections `3` and `4` similarity and concept work

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.prompt: Steam Deck games like Hades II
entries.judgeNotes: Every row should be a believable Hades II comp with Steam Deck proof. Penalize broad action-RPG neighborhood drift.

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.prompt: Games similar to Hollow Knight with better reviews
entries.judgeNotes: Honor the review constraint and produce an actually believable Hollow Knight comp set, not a broad metroidvania dump.

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.prompt: Show me developers similar to Supergiant Games
entries.judgeNotes: Peer set should feel credible and include flagship context plus why-it-matches reasoning.

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.prompt: Find games in the same series as Dark Souls
entries.judgeNotes: Exact-series lookup is zero-tolerance. One off-franchise row is enough to break trust materially.

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.judgeNotes: Mostly credible concept board with only light stretch in the tail. Reward believable investigation angle over keyword collisions.

entries.primaryPersona: Developer Studio Lead or Product Lead
entries.prompt: Relaxing puzzle games with beautiful art
entries.judgeNotes: The board should feel curated and aesthetically aligned, not like a pile of casual keyword matches.
